title: saussurea tilesii var. glabriuscula
intro: Saussurea tilesii var. glabriuscula, also known as the Sichuan saussurea, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in Tibetan and Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Saussurea tilesii var. glabriuscula is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in traditional herbal medicine, and is also used in the form of capsules or tablets in modern herbal supplements.
